title: RevisionFragment
description: RevisionFragment: Stores the current and previous Hash of the parent BHoMObject, as assigned after the inclusion in a Revision.

PreviousHash.description: Previous object Hash, typically the one it had in its previous Revision.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
